name: Hybrid Analysis
description: Integration with Hybrid Analysis for security operations

actions.name: Submit File for Analysis
actions.description: Submit a file to the Hybrid Analysis sandbox for dynamic analysis

actions.name: Submit URL for Analysis
actions.description: Submit a URL to be analyzed in the sandbox (not for enrichment - triggers analysis)

actions.name: Get Analysis Report
actions.description: Get the analysis report for a file by its SHA256 hash

actions.name: Get Report Summary
actions.description: Get a summary of the analysis for a specific submission

actions.name: Get Job State
actions.description: Check the status of an analysis job

actions.name: Quick Scan
actions.description: Check if a file has been previously analyzed without submitting

actions.name: Get Dropped Files
actions.description: Get list of files dropped during sandbox analysis

actions.name: Get Extracted Strings
actions.description: Get extracted strings and network indicators from analysis
